ood/implication_chains/verify.source_text:
MODE verify
PROBLEM
HYP h0 : p0
HYP h1 : p0 -> p1
HYP h2 : p1 -> p2
HYP h3 : p2 -> p3
HYP h4 : p3 -> p4
HYP h5 : p4 -> p5
HYP h6 : p5 -> p6
HYP h7 : p6 -> p7
HYP h8 : p0 -> p10
HYP h9 : p0 -> p12
HYP h10 : p1 -> p5
HYP h11 : p1 -> p12
HYP h12 : p5 -> p3
HYP h13 : p5 -> p7
HYP h14 : p8 -> p4
HYP h15 : p8 -> p11
HYP h16 : p12 -> p0
HYP h17 : p12 -> p7
GOAL p7
STATE
DERIVE p0 BY h0
DERIVE p1 BY h1 FROM p0
DERIVE p2 BY h2 FROM p1
DERIVE p3 BY h3 FROM p2
DERIVE p4 BY h4 FROM p3
DERIVE p5 BY h5 FROM p4
DERIVE p6 BY h6 FROM p5
DERIVE p7 BY h7 FROM p6
